# Transcrição: 25. AFFORDABIUTY CLOSE - SOME KIND OF FEAR OF BUYING

## [00:00 - 00:13]

You just heard, I don't think I can afford to do this. Look, is this some kind of fear that you experience every time you buy something? Now ask yourself, when's the last time you bought something you couldn't afford? Great, let's do this.
